subcodes.first_line: O thou trustee of the Lord! In the world of being all created things are in the most intimate connection with each other
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین ربانی در عالم ایجاد جمیع کائنات در نهایت ارتباط و از این ارتباط تعاون
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being
